title: Pillager Raids are Craftable
description: Throw a honey bottle, emerald block, and blaze powder on the ground to create a potion of bad omen.
body:
Waiting for pillager captains to spawn is kind of annoying, and raid farms are highly complex. With this datapack, you can throw 1 honey bottle, 1 emerald block, and 1 blaze powder next to each other on the ground, creating a potion of bad omen. Please only craft one at a time, or the rest of your ingredients will disappear!

Q: Can you change thing X for me?
- A: This is a quick datapack I made on my free time for myself and my friends to use. But, I'm not unreasonable, and I might consider it if I have time.

Q: How do I install?
- A: Simply put it in the "datapacks" folder in your world folder, and it should automatically load the next time you load the world or start the server. If not, you can use the '/datapack enable' command.

Q: It's not working
- A: Make sure the datapack is enabled, and that you are actually using the right ingredients. I made the same mistake.

Q: Why a honey bottle instead of a water bottle, like normal potions?
- A: I guess because they don't have enough uses outside redstone, lol? Also it was easier to code.

Q: I want to contact you for X reason
- A: On tumblr, I am @saliva-toaster
